text.title: Graph-Indexed vs Diff-Only AI Reviewers Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: curate-eval-set
step.action: Pick ≥ 5 PRs across risk levels with known bug labels.

step.name: run-both-tools
step.action: Trigger each tool on each PR; capture comments.

step.name: compile-scorecard
step.action: Compute precision / recall / coverage per tool.

step.name: write-adr
step.action: Author ADR with decision + rationale + trade-offs; commit.
